differential_diagnoses: Cushing's syndrome secondary to adrenocortical carcinoma (producing ectopic ACTH or excess cortisol)
next_steps: Urgent endocrinology consultation for biochemical confirmation of Cushing's syndrome (midnight cortisol, 24-hour urinary free cortisol, ACTH)
CSF studies: India ink, cryptococcal antigen, bacterial, fungal, and mycobacterial cultures, and broad-range 16S/18S ribosomal RNA gene sequencing
Empiric antimicrobial coverage for Listeria (ampicillin plus gentamicin) and fungal meningitis (liposomal amphotericin B plus flucytosine)
Consultation with neurosurgery regarding MRI compatibility of the vagus-nerve stimulator to enable urgent neuroimaging
Systemic evaluation for source of hypercortisolism (repeat CT abdomen with protocol for adrenal masses)
